discoveries.title: Fee transparency and basket abandonment study
discoveries.description: Validate which fee, discount, tip, and membership explanations reduce checkout abandonment without hiding real marketplace economics.

discoveries.title: Merchant prep-time signal quality discovery
discoveries.description: Identify which merchant, item, demand, and staffing signals best predict ready-for-pickup time by store type.

discoveries.title: Grocery substitution trust discovery
discoveries.description: Identify which substitution controls, shopper communication, item availability signals, and refund policies improve grocery repeat usage.

discoveries.title: Courier offer and earnings transparency discovery
discoveries.description: Determine which offer details and post-delivery earnings explanations increase courier trust without making dispatch offers too slow to evaluate.

discoveries.title: Sponsored placement marketplace guardrails discovery
discoveries.description: Validate how sponsored ranking should balance merchant demand generation, consumer relevance, delivery reliability, and ad yield.

discoveries.title: Refund abuse and fairness discovery
discoveries.description: Map consumer issue patterns, refund abuse signals, merchant dispute paths, and support outcomes to tune policy controls without hurting legitimate recovery.

discoveries.title: Active courier supply forecast discovery
discoveries.description: Assess which weather, event, demand, merchant prep, and incentive signals best predict peak-zone supply gaps.

discoveries.title: Partner API error taxonomy discovery
discoveries.description: Classify POS, catalog sync, order injection, inventory, webhook, authentication, and rate-limit errors so partner diagnostics can be prioritized.
